name: Nutty Bean-Rice Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cooked soy (or other dry beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and celery in 1 tablespoon of the butter for 2 to 3 minutes.
2. Add beans, rice, sunflower seeds, cheese, flour, pickle relish, ketchup, soy sauce, basil, eggs, and black pepper. Mix well until combined.
3. Shape into 8 patties about 1/2 inch thick.
4. Heat remaining butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Add patties to the skillet and cook slowly for 15 minutes, turning once to ensure even browning on all sides.
6. Transfer burgers to a serving platter.
7. Garnish with onion rings and pickle slices if desired.
8. Serve with chili sauce, if preferred.
Makes 4 servings.
